mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (user_id, title, body, audit_status, audit_remark, view_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditRemark}, #{viewCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.audit_status = 'APPROVED'
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.body LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.audit_status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorName, p.title, p.body, p.audit_status AS auditStatus, p.audit_remark AS auditRemark, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM forum_post p JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.user_id
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.body LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY p.id DESC
